name: Blueberry Couscous Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over and wash the blueberries, then set them on paper towels to dry.
2. Combine the apple juice, vanilla, and couscous in a large saucepan. Bring to a boil.
3. Cook, stirring constantly until thickened and all juice absorbed. Remove from heat.
4. Gently fold the blueberries into the hot mixture.
5. Rinse and do not dry a 9x14 inch cake pan. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
6. Chill until set, about 2 hours.
7. Cut into squares and serve without guilt.
Variations:
Use strawberries in place of blueberries, top with unsweetened fruit jam thinned with a little water, and arrange fruit slices on top for decoration.
